title: MCP tools/list response — tools array
description: Validates the 'tools' array returned in an MCP tools/list response per the 2025-03-26 specification.

name.description: Tool identifier — must match the MCP tool name regex

description.description: Human-readable tool description, at most 1024 characters

type.description: Must always be 'object' per MCP spec

properties.description: Maps parameter names to their JSON Schema property definitions

required.description: Names of parameters that are required
